---
title: Challenge Reference
description: Shared rules, scoring definitions, and benchmark conventions used by challenge pages.
---

Shared challenge material for task pages: reusable definitions, conventions,
and links.

Per-challenge protocol source: `challenges/<challenge-id>/challenge.qmd`.
Rendered pages: [OpenDC](../../challenges/). Scope: definitions used by
multiple challenges.

## Pages

- [Open Problems and Challenges](research-challenges.html): open problems in physics and AI/ML research, and the related open challenges.
- [Challenge Rules](rules.html): shared structure, validation, and submission expectations.
- [Metrics](metrics.html): scoring definitions and rationale used by challenge pages.
